note: Video Embed Field configures entirely per-field/formatter in Field UI with no global config surface, so all cases are `recipe` (response-graded), not `execution` (live-state). Facts are grounded in the 3.1.x docs (data.json, usage.md, agent/).

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want editors to paste a YouTube or Vimeo URL into a single text box on a content type, and have Drupal store and later render the video. Which field type do I add, and what does the field actually store?
evals.expected_output: Add a Video Embed field (field type id `video_embed_field`); the widget is a single text box (VideoTextfield) that stores the provider video URL, validated against supported providers.

evals.prompt: In Video Embed Field, what plugin type powers the built-in YouTube and Vimeo support, and which annotation and namespace directory do these provider plugins use?
evals.expected_output: The VideoEmbedProvider plugin type: plugins live in Plugin/video_embed_field/Provider, use the @VideoEmbedProvider annotation, are gathered by ProviderManager (video_embed_field.provider_manager); built-ins are youtube, youtube_playlist and vimeo.

evals.prompt: I want to add support for a brand-new video host to Video Embed Field. Sketch the plugin class: which base class do I extend and which methods must I implement at minimum?
evals.expected_output: Create a @VideoEmbedProvider plugin in Plugin/video_embed_field/Provider extending ProviderPluginBase (ProviderPluginInterface), implementing at minimum isApplicable(), renderEmbed() and getRemoteThumbnailUrl().

evals.prompt: On Manage Display for an entity with a Video Embed field, which formatter renders the full embedded player iframe, and which one renders a locally-cached preview thumbnail image? Give the formatter ids.
evals.expected_output: The Video formatter (video_embed_field_video) renders the full responsive/fixed iframe player; the Thumbnail formatter (video_embed_field_thumbnail) renders the locally-cached preview image, optionally linked to content or the provider.

evals.prompt: I added the Video formatter for a Video Embed field and I want the YouTube player to scale to its container width instead of a fixed size. Which formatter setting controls this?
evals.expected_output: Enable the `responsive` formatter setting (default TRUE); when on it fills the container width and hides the explicit width/height (default 854/480) settings.

evals.prompt: I want to use Video Embed Field videos as entities in Drupal's core Media library. Which submodule of video_embed_field bridges the field to core Media so I can create a Media type backed by it?
evals.expected_output: Enable the video_embed_media submodule, which integrates the field with core Media so you can create a Media type backed by video_embed_field for the Media library.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I need to replace the built-in YouTube provider class in Video Embed Field with my own implementation. Which hook do I implement and what do I change?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_video_embed_field_provider_info_alter(&$definitions) and set $definitions['youtube']['class'] to your custom provider class.

evals.prompt: For accessibility I need certain roles to never get autoplaying videos, even though the formatter has autoplay enabled. What does Video Embed Field provide for this?
evals.expected_output: Grant/deny the `never autoplay videos` permission per role; roles with it never receive autoplay regardless of the formatter's autoplay setting.
